title: eugenia maritima
intro: Eugenia maritima, also known as the sea guava or coastal strawberry tree, is a small evergreen shrub native to the tropical coastlines of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Eugenia maritima has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
